scripts.pretest: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const roots = ['apps', 'packages']; const hasWorkspacePackage = roots.some((root) => fs.existsSync(root) && fs.readdirSync(root, { withFileTypes: true }).some((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && fs.existsSync(root + '/' + entry.name + '/package.json'))); if (!hasWorkspacePackage) { console.error('No workspace packages found under apps/* or packages/*'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prelint: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const roots = ['apps', 'packages']; const hasWorkspacePackage = roots.some((root) => fs.existsSync(root) && fs.readdirSync(root, { withFileTypes: true }).some((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && fs.existsSync(root + '/' + entry.name + '/package.json'))); if (!hasWorkspacePackage) { console.error('No workspace packages found under apps/* or packages/*'); process.exit(1); }"
